notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the Secretary of the Interior to promulgate regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 98–481, § 898 Stat. 2254Oct. 17, 1984
